profile.name: Shafayat Alam
profile.title: Mechanical Engineer · Roboticist
profile.bio: Mechanical Engineering graduate from Stony Brook University with experience across marine robotics, computational fluid dynamics, and marine/aerospace systems engineering. I'm drawn to problems where rigorous analysis and hands on engineering converge to develop and validate systems that move through a fluid media. My interests span the full stack in research and engineering of mobile robotics systems that interact with a fluid medium, always grounded in rigorous analysis and testing.
profile.education: B.E. Mechanical Engineering · Stony Brook University · 2026
